headline: TSMC’s Record Q1 AI Revenue Puts Capex And Growth In Focus
summary: TSMC (NYSE:TSM) reported preliminary Q1 2026 results showing record revenue growth, driven by strong demand for AI chips and advanced-node manufacturing. Revenue for the quarter was up 35% year on year, exceeding earlier expectations and supported by orders from major customers including Nvidia and Apple. The company also reported strong March 2026 revenue on both a month on month and year on year basis, alongside continued investment in capacity. Management issued a confident outlook for...
